description: Lycanthrope-descended humanoids briefly unleashing the beast within, caught between two natures.
subraces: Bear-blooded defenders sprouting thick hide and shrugging off blows when shifted.
Wolf-blooded fighters extending savage fangs and biting through armor mid-battle.
Cat-blooded runners gaining blinding speed, dodging away from any attacker.
Hound-blooded trackers whose shifted senses pinpoint hidden creatures within miles.
Tiger-blooded predators sprouting wicked claws and slashing with feral precision.
